title: BattlePass Classic
description: A fully customizable Battle Pass plugin for Minecraft with quests, rewards, and EXP-based progression!
body:
#### 🎯 **New Main Menu**
- **Command:** Now only `/bp` to open the main menu
- **Progress Bar:** Visual level progress indicator (9 slots)
- **Navigation:** Two buttons - "Levels" and "Quests"
- **Information:** Hover over progress bar shows completion percentage

![bp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5143492754463125a750f13004d1e723aff17c76_0.webp)

#### 🎁 **Reward Type System**
- **Free Rewards:** Available to all players
- **VIP Rewards:** Require `battlepass.vip` permission
- **Combo Rewards:** Give Free + VIP rewards simultaneously
- **Visual Differences:** Different colors and icons for each type
  ![level](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7cf280c4cc7c8ea5256df1cff4d294f04bb7ea4_0.webp)

![vip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79b89f30c1349415faa8824d2dc6a1073ee09cca_0.webp)

![combo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84f2887be5fd1f0239559a8cbd27eead3d280bbc_0.webp)

#### 📋 **Quest System (9 Categories)**
1. **⛏️ Mining** - stone, coal, iron, diamonds, obsidian
2. **🌾 Farming** - wheat, potatoes, carrots, pumpkins, melons
3. **⚔️ Combat** - zombies, skeletons, spiders, creepers, endermen
4. **🎣 Fishing** - cod, salmon, tropical fish, pufferfish, moonfish
5. **🗺️ Exploration** - various walking distances
6. **🏗️ Building** - wood, stone, slabs, dirt, bricks
7. **🔴 Redstone** - redstone, lapis, gold, emeralds, quartz
8. **🔥 Nether** - netherite, zombified piglins, ghasts, netherrack, blazes
9. **🌌 End** - endermen, end stone, shulkers, purpur, dragon

#### ⚙️ **Technical Improvements**
- **Modular Architecture:** Separation into individual classes
- **Optimization:** Improved performance
- **Configuration:** Flexible settings in config.yml
- **Data Persistence:** Reliable progress saving system

#### 🔧 **Bug Fixes**
- Fixed negative percentage bug in progress bar
- Improved error handling
- Optimized data loading

---

## 📝 **Установка / Installation**

1. Скопируйте `BattlePass-1.0-shaded.jar` в папку `plugins`
2. Перезапустите сервер
3. Настройте конфигурацию в `plugins/BattlePass/`
4. Выдайте право `battlepass.vip` для VIP наград

1. Copy `BattlePass-1.0-shaded.jar` to the `plugins` folder
2. Restart the server
3. Configure settings in `plugins/BattlePass/`
4. Grant `battlepass.vip` permission for VIP rewards

---

## 🎮 **Команды / Commands**

- `/bp` - Открыть главное меню / Open main menu
- `/bp reload` - Перезагрузить конфигурацию (админ) / Reload configuration (admin)

---

## 🔐 **Права / Permissions**

- `tatsubattlepass.use` - Использование плагина / Use the plugin
- `battlepass.vip` - Доступ к VIP наградам / Access to VIP rewards
- `tatsubattlepass.admin` - Админ-команды / Admin commands
